strengths: Over 15 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary stack (Java).
Direct, hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and workflows at re:cinq, directly matching a key requirement.
Exceptional testing and software craftsmanship background, including TDD advocacy, creating Selenium courses, and building custom test libraries.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are core to the primary stack, though adaptable given his deep Node.js and testing background.
No explicit experience listed for Python or Playwright, which are noted in the required technical skills.
Has a history of relatively short tenures and concurrent consulting projects in earlier roles, though recent positions show better stability.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate for the Senior Fullstack Developer role. He possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience, thoroughly covering the required TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Java stacks, alongside AWS, Kubernetes, and MongoDB. Crucially, his current role at re:cinq provides concrete evidence of AI agent development (MCP code generators), which directly fulfills a highly specific job requirement. His extensive background in TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship guarantees high-quality, scalable solutions. Although his resume omits specific mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his profound expertise in Node.js and building custom test frameworks indicates he will adapt rapidly.
